joke: Why did the cat sit on the computer? To keep an eye on the mouse.
My cat perches on my laptop all day. She says she's keeping tabs on the mouse.
I asked my cat what she thought of my cooking. She walked out of the room.
My dog is an excellent guard dog. He's been guarding the couch for six years.
We got a guard dog. So far the only thing he guards is his spot on the sofa.
My dog learned to shake hands. Now he won't sign anything without his lawyer.
My wife told me to stop impersonating a flamingo. I had to put my foot down.
My spouse demanded I quit the flamingo impression, so I put my foot down.
My husband and I agreed to never go to bed angry. We haven't slept in three weeks.
My boss told me to have a good day, so I went home.
The manager said to have a good day. So I left the office and had one.
Our office motto is teamwork: everyone doing what I say.
I told my doctor I broke my arm in two places. He told me to stop going to those places.
Doctor, my arm is broken in two places. His advice: avoid both of them.
Why did the doctor carry a red pen? In case she needed to draw blood.
Why do programmers prefer dark mode? Because light attracts bugs.
Programmers like dark mode for one simple reason: bugs are drawn to the light.
A programmer's spouse says: buy a loaf of bread, and if they have eggs, get a dozen. The programmer comes home with twelve loaves.
The airline lost my luggage, so now my clothes are better traveled than I am.
My suitcase has seen more countries than me. The airline keeps sending it on solo trips.
The pilot announced we'd land shortly. Twenty minutes later he clarified: shortly after fuel runs out.
I don't have a coffee problem. I have a coffee solution.
People say I drink too much coffee. Wrong: caffeine is not my problem, it's my solution.
Decaf coffee is like a hairless cat: technically it exists, but why.
I bought a treadmill and it's the most expensive coat rack I've ever owned.
My treadmill gets daily use, mostly as a place to hang jackets.
My gym membership and I have an open relationship. We only see each other twice a year.
It was so cold outside I saw a politician with his hands in his own pockets.
How cold was it? Cold enough that the politician finally warmed his hands in his own pockets.
The forecast said 100% chance of rain, so my umbrella stayed home out of spite.
My dog ate my homework, which was awkward, because I'm the teacher.
I used to be a banker, but I lost interest.
